headline: We have detected 47 open tabs and one secret shame tab.
subhead: Your RAM has filed for witness protection.
bulletins: The loud one is hiding behind a 'todo' list from 2019.
Four are duplicate calendars and one is a prophecy.
Closing tabs may trigger an immediate identity shift.
Reminder: 'restore previous session' is not a lifestyle.

feature.name: Desk Weather
feature.description: Your desk now has atmospheric conditions. Please dress accordingly (emotionally).
